name: Velocity Financial, Inc.
business: Velocity Financial originates, securitizes, and manages a nationwide portfolio of investor real estate loans secured primarily by 1-4 unit residential rental properties, as well as multi-family, mixed use, and commercial properties. The company originates loans through a network of independent mortgage brokers and direct borrower relationships. Loans are made for business purposes only.
sellsTo: direct borrowers (investors in residential rental and small commercial properties)
namedSuppliers: Onity Group Inc. (formerly PHH Mortgage Corporation)

exposures.sentence: We primarily originate investor loans secured by 1-4 unit residential rental properties, as well as loans for multi-family, mixed use and commercial properties.

tamClaims.sentence: According to a press release by Zillow on Sep 8, 2025, the U.S. housing market is worth a record $55.1 trillion.

tamClaims.claim: More than 90% of small investors own 10 properties or less
tamClaims.sentence: According to data published by CNBC on Oct 7, 2025, more than 90% of small investors own 10 properties or less, while the largest investors, those with 1,000 or more properties, comprise 2% of all investor-owned homes.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 904,145 state-licensed mortgage originators as of September 30, 2025
tamClaims.sentence: We believe that represents a small portion of the mortgage originators in the United States, which consisted of approximately 904,145 state-licensed mortgage originators as of September 30, 2025, according to the Nationwide Multistate Licensing System.
According to data from the U.S. Census Bureau, the U.S. home rentership rate (the inverse of the home ownership rate) has averaged approximately 34.3%.
